jsDoc.doc: Check if a value is a valid Strava ID (integer).
Check if a value is a valid Activity ID.
Check if a value is a valid Athlete ID.
Check if a value is a valid Segment ID.
Check if a value is a valid Gear ID (string).

Check if a value is a valid ActivityType.
Also accepts any string (for custom activity types).
Check if a value is a known/standard ActivityType.
Check if a value is a valid Sex value.
Check if a value is a valid ResourceState.
Check if a value is a valid SportType.
Check if a value is a valid StreamType.
Check if a value is a valid UnitSystem.
Check if a value is a plain object (not null, not array).
Check if a value is a valid polyline map.
Check if a value is a valid MetaAthlete.

Check if a value is a SummaryActivity.
Validates only critical fields: id, name, distance.

Check if a value is a DetailedActivity.
Validates critical fields: id, name, distance, calories.
Check if a value is an array of SummaryActivity objects.
Check if a value is an array of DetailedActivity objects.
Check if a value is a Lap.
Check if a value is a Split.
Check if a value is a PhotoSummary.

Check if a value is a SummaryAthlete.
Validates critical fields: id, firstname, lastname.

Check if a value is a DetailedAthlete.
Validates critical fields and required DetailedAthlete fields.
Check if a value is an array of SummaryAthlete objects.
Check if a value is a SummaryClub.

Check if a value is a SummarySegment.
Validates critical fields: id, name, distance.
Check if a value is a DetailedSegment.
Check if a value is an array of SummarySegment objects.

Check if a value is a SummarySegmentEffort.
Validates critical fields: id, elapsed_time, distance.
Check if a value is a DetailedSegmentEffort.
Check if a value is an array of DetailedSegmentEffort objects.
Check if a value is an ExplorerSegment.

Check if a value is a DataStream.
Validates critical fields: type, data array.

Check if a value is a LatLngStream.
Validates critical fields: type is 'latlng', data is array of [lat, lng] pairs.
Check if a value is a Stream (either DataStream or LatLngStream).

Check if a value is a StreamSet.
Validates that it's an object with potential stream properties.
Check if a StreamSet has valid latlng data.

tags.value:
@jpravetz/strava-schema

TypeScript types and type guards for the Strava API.

This package provides TypeScript interfaces and lightweight type guards
for all Strava API data structures. Use this package to ensure type safety
when working with Strava data.

Unlike the original Zod-based implementation, this version uses pure
TypeScript interfaces with minimal runtime type guards for better
performance and simpler code.

jsDoc.doc: A unique identifier for a Strava object (integer).
Activity ID type
Athlete ID type
Segment ID type
Activity type names as defined by the Strava API.
Activity type constants for use in code.
Activity zone types (heartrate, power).
Follower status values.
Resource state values: Meta = 1, Summary = 2, Detail = 3.
Sex values.
Sport names.
Stream key types.
Stream key constants for use in code.
Unit system values.
Stream resolution values.
Stream series type values.
Timed zone range with time spent in zone.
Map data with polyline encoding.
Meta information for an athlete reference.
Meta information for an activity reference.
Achievement earned during an activity.
External ID from the original data source.
Upload ID for the activity.
A lap within an activity.
A split within an activity (metric or standard).
Activity zone data (heartrate or power).
Activity total statistics.
Activity statistics for an athlete.
Primary photo for an activity.
Photo summary for an activity.

Summary activity - basic information about an activity.
This is the most common activity type returned by the API.

Detailed activity - full activity information.
Extends SummaryActivity with additional fields.
Summary information about a club.
Summary athlete - basic athlete information.
Detailed athlete - full athlete information.
A comment on an activity.
Gear ID type (string identifier)
Detailed gear information.
Summary gear information.
Segment name type
Effort ID type

Summary segment effort - represents an athlete's effort on a segment.
Uses interface to handle circular dependency with SummarySegment.
Detailed segment effort - extends SummarySegmentEffort with additional fields.

Summary segment - represents a segment with basic information.
Uses interface to handle circular dependency with SummarySegmentEffort.
Detailed segment - extends SummarySegment with additional fields.
Explorer segment - used for segment exploration API.
Base stream interface for non-latlng data.
Latitude/Longitude stream interface.
Union type for all stream types.

StreamSet contains all available streams for an activity.
Not all streams are present for every activity.
Keys for numeric data streams (excluding latlng).
All stream keys including latlng.
A range of values with min and max.
Power zone ranges.
Heart rate zone ranges.
All zones for an athlete.
